svg.title: Locality-sensitive hashing, query time
svg.desc: The query is hashed by the sign of its dot product with the same three fixed hyperplanes, forming a bucket key. The key selects a bucket in table 1 containing candidate vectors x(1) and x(2); the other tables contribute more candidates. The union of bucket members is verified with exact distances.
svg.text: probed bucket — q reproduced the key x(1) and x(2) got at index time
each bit: which side of one fixed random hyperplane q falls on
